_meta.source: live CDP getComputedStyle font-family frequency on https://www.upstage.ai/

primary_body.role: Body, paragraph, navigation, button label, footer column, card text
primary_body.license_note: Geist is the open-source Vercel Sans variant — public webfont, no licensing concern for reference research.

display_hero.frequency: 3 sampled hero H1 phrases (e.g. 'Supercharge', 'with AI.', 'Experience the future of work.')
display_hero.role: Hero-only display face. Anchors the largest typographic moment at 57.6px / weight 600.
display_hero.license_note: Espeak is a proprietary commissioned/custom display face — reference-only; do NOT redistribute or substitute as the actual Upstage face on derivative work. For OmD generation, use a tonally similar open display (e.g. Söhne, Inter Display, or PP Neue Montreal) as a stand-in.

rotating_industry_swap.role: Marks the variable slot in the hero sentence with a typographic shift, not a color or weight shift. Signature move — pairs the custom display with a humble monospace to read 'this part is the configurable one'.
rotating_industry_swap.size_observed: 48px (down from 57.6px Espeak around it) — slight de-emphasis on swap word

fallback_unhydrated.role: Default sans before Geist loads — system fallback

system_ui_chrome.stack: system-ui, -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Fira Sans', 'Droid Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
system_ui_chrome.frequency: 11 elements — auxiliary chrome (browser-default form controls / overlays)
system_ui_chrome.role: Webflow's bundled system fallback for non-hydrated UI
